summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ghostd UI redesign. All backend APIs working (6/6 passed). Frontend successfully transformed from Jobflow to Ghostd with new design system: warm beige background, dark nav bar, Playfair Display + DM Sans fonts, tan accents, no shadows/glassmorphism. All navigation and core functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Login page with ghostd branding and Playfair Display
Dark top navigation bar (#1C1917) with correct styling
Ghostd logo with tan accent dot (#C0A882)
All navigation links working (Pipeline, ATS Checker, Dashboard, Contacts)
Board page empty state with 'Nothing here yet.' message
Add Application modal opens with correct styling
DM Sans font family correctly applied
Tan accent color (#C0A882) on Add button
Rejected column renamed to 'Ghosted' in UI
